description_long: This mosque features a large rectangular structure with a prominent central entrance flanked by two tall, slender minarets capped with blue domes and finials. The main prayer hall is topped with a medium-sized, blue central dome, surrounded by four smaller decorative domes at the corners of the entrance area. The facade includes arched colonnades and a portico, with symmetrical side wings extending from the central section. The roof is mostly flat and covered in a reddish-brown material, contrasting with the white and blue color scheme of the main building. The architectural details suggest a blend of traditional Islamic and Indo-Islamic influences, with minimal visible ornamentation.
description: A large, white mosque with two tall minarets, a central blue dome, and a broad reddish-brown roof. The entrance is grand, with arched colonnades and smaller domes accenting the facade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mosque's flat reddish-brown roof, one minaret, and the blue dome with smaller domes near the entrance.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the grand entrance, two tall minarets, central blue dome, and symmetrical side wings with arched colonnades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the flat roof, one minaret, and the blue dome, with less detail of the entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the large reddish-brown roof, with the tops of the two minarets and the blue dome visible above the roofline.
attribute_dome: One medium-sized central dome with a blue finish and a pointed finial, surrounded by four smaller blue domes at the entrance corners; all domes are smooth and lack visible patterns.
attribute_minaret: Two tall, slender minarets with blue domed tops and finials, positioned symmetrically at the front corners of the mosque, rising significantly above the main roof.
attribute_architectural_style: Indo-Islamic with modern influences, characterized by tall minarets, a central dome, arched colonnades, and a symmetrical facade.
